overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a sunlit medieval Middle Eastern city. The character navigates narrow cobblestone streets, open plazas with palm trees, covered courtyards, and ascending terraces with distinctive mud-brick architecture and vibrant flowering plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with decorative fountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow cobblestone street, passing pedestrians and market stalls

notable_agents.action: child running past the protagonist toward the left side of the street

entered.detail: ornate wall fountain with blue and white ceramic tile mosaic and running water
tan-colored adobe buildings with wooden doors and small windows lining both sides of the street
wooden cart loaded with hay parked along the left wall
tall palm tree visible above the rooftops in the distance

segments.scene_description: The protagonist walks through a narrow sunlit street lined with mud-brick buildings. A decorative tiled fountain is visible on the right wall while pedestrians in period clothing walk in various directions. The street is paved with uneven cobblestones and a wooden hay cart sits parked on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with large central shade tree

events.description: exits narrow street into sunlit open plaza dominated by a large spreading tree

agents.ego_description: walking toward and passing under the large central acacia tree in the plaza

entered.detail: massive spreading tree with dense green canopy providing shade over the plaza center
wide open paved area surrounded by buildings with clear sky overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright plaza centered around a magnificent large tree. The protagonist walks across the sun-dappled paved ground toward the tree, passing from the enclosed street into this more open space. Buildings recede into the background as the camera approaches the tree's shade.

events.description: enters shaded courtyard where lattice roof casts grid-patterned shadows on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway under the wooden pergola structure

entered.detail: wooden lattice roof overhead casting geometric shadow patterns on the ground below
large terracotta pots with flowering plants placed along the courtyard walls
intricate blue and white patterned tile inlay on the courtyard floor

segments.scene_description: The protagonist enters a covered courtyard sheltered by a wooden lattice pergola overhead. The lighting shifts to dappled shade with geometric shadow patterns on the decorative tiled floor. Potted plants and wicker baskets line the mud-brick walls of this tranquil enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with flowering bushes and ascending stairs

events.description: exits covered courtyard into street lined with vibrant purple flowering bushes
begins ascending wide stone staircase toward upper terrace level

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs while passing groups of pedestrians and guards

notable_agents.action: group of guards in red robes standing near a building entrance

entered.detail: large dense bushes with vibrant purple flowers growing along the building walls
wide stone staircase leading upward to the next terrace level
green fabric canopy stretched across the street above the stairs

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered courtyard, the street opens to reveal stunning purple bougainvillea cascading down walls. The protagonist approaches and begins ascending a wide stone staircase shaded by a green fabric awning. Guards in red robes stand watch near a doorway as other pedestrians descend the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with cypress trees and grand building

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering open terrace with tall cypress trees and grand building view

agents.ego_description: approaching the grand building with red banner while passing a hay cart

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the wall observing the area

entered.detail: tall slender dark green cypress trees lining the terrace edge
impressive two-story stone building with large red banner hanging above the entrance
large wooden cart heavily loaded with hay blocking part of the path

segments.scene_description: The protagonist emerges onto an open upper terrace lined with elegant cypress trees. A grand building with a prominent red banner dominates the view ahead. The character walks past a large hay cart toward the building entrance while a guard stands watch nearby.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, bustling street through a series of sheltered courtyards and finally onto an elevated urban terrace. It begins by following the protagonist through a sunlit alley of mud-brick buildings and cobblestones, passing a tiled fountain and a parked hay cart. As the enclosed street opens, the camera moves into a bright, sun-dappled plaza centered around a magnificent large tree before shifting into the geometric shadows of a covered courtyard sheltered by a wooden lattice pergola. The scene then transitions back into the light, revealing cascading purple bougainvillea as the protagonist ascends a wide stone staircase shaded by a green awning. Finally, the camera emerges onto an open upper terrace lined with cypress trees, moving past another hay cart toward a grand building marked by a prominent red banner.
